title: Senior Financial Analyst - Sharekhan Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Sharekhan Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sharekhan Global Group! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sharekhan Global Group:
Sharekhan Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan Global Group!
